summary: Executed full backend+frontend verification for delivery files, paid download gating, checkout success downloads, analytics tracking/admin filters, testimonials management, blog detail pages, and purchase URL cleanup. Most flows pass; paid checkout success UI fails due to backend status endpoint overriding paid records to unpaid on provider fallback.

critical.issue: For seeded paid transactions, Stripe status lookup failure fallback forcibly updates payment_status to unpaid/open, which revokes previously paid access and hides downloads.

ui_bugs.issue: Paid checkout success page does not render download panel because payment status polling endpoint downgrades transaction to unpaid on fallback.

integration_issues.flow: Paid checkout -> status poll -> downloads panel
integration_issues.issue: Integration regression between /api/payments/status and /api/payments/{session_id}/downloads: status poll can mutate paid transaction to unpaid, causing empty downloads and broken paid UX.

action_items: Fix /api/payments/status/{session_id} fallback logic: do not downgrade already-paid transactions when provider status is temporarily unavailable.
In fallback path, preserve existing DB payment_status if paid/processed is already true.
Retest checkout success paid UI panel after backend fix with status polling active.
critical_code_review_comments: Payment status endpoint mutates persisted transaction state on external provider lookup failure, causing data integrity regression (paid -> unpaid).
Checkout success UI behavior is currently tightly coupled to status endpoint side effects; this surfaced as a user-visible paid-download access bug.
Frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is correctly used; no hardcoded API base URL issues found in tested files.
seed_data_creation: Temporary seeded paid transactions + product files created via scripts and cleaned up after each verification run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend pytest tests pass (22/22) including file manager, analytics, and purchase URL checks. Critical remaining issue is paid-checkout UI integration: if checkout success page polls /payments/status and provider lookup fails, backend currently overwrites paid state to unpaid; downloads panel disappears. Reproduce with seeded paid session: call /payments/{session_id}/downloads first (shows files), then call /payments/status/{session_id} (fallback), then /payments/{session_id}/downloads (becomes empty).
rca of the issue: RCA: In /api/payments/status/{session_id}, exception fallback sets transaction status/payment_status to open/unpaid unconditionally. For valid paid transactions (including webhook-confirmed or pre-set paid records), a temporary Stripe lookup error causes destructive state downgrade. Repro: (1) Seed paid transaction + attached product file; (2) GET /api/payments/{session_id}/downloads => paid with file link; (3) GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} when Stripe lookup fails => DB updated unpaid/open; (4) GET /api/payments/{session_id}/downloads => unpaid empty list; UI checkout success shows timeout/no downloads. Mitigation: make fallback non-destructive—preserve existing paid state, return provider_status warning only, and avoid writing unpaid when transaction is already paid/processed.
